name: OpenSky Secured Visa Credit Card
perks: No credit check required to apply (no hard or soft pull on credit report)
Accept applicants with no credit history, thin credit, or poor credit
Deposit between $200 and $3,000 to set your credit limit
Reports to all three major credit bureaus monthly
Can increase credit limit by adding to deposit
Path to unsecured card after demonstrating positive payment history
Low cash advance fee compared to similar cards
drawbacks: High APR for a secured card
No automatic upgrade to unsecured card
No mobile app with full-featured controls
